title: agrostis ravennae
intro: Agrostis ravennae, also known as redtop, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Agrostis ravennae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Agrostis ravennae can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
